--- 
title: "Semantic theory additional resources"
author: "Lisa Hofmann"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
---

# Introduction

## What is semantic theory

- [What is semantics? by Richmond H. Thomason (online resource)](https://web.eecs.umich.edu/~rthomaso/documents/general/what-is-semantics.html)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/AySe4c3fPR8?si=wma7mFhxqKPtSDER" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## The MU puzzle

- [MIU Explorer (little web app) on Wolfram demonstrations](https://demonstrations.wolfram.com/MIUExplorer/)
- [Gödel, Escher, Bach: An Eternal Golden Braid by Douglas Hofstadter (full text pdf)](https://commons.library.stonybrook.edu/library_books/1/)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/xSVFRx3IUqs?si=9T61DpbkZYhSxL71" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## From formal systems to formal logic

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EpMfZvbmO0c?si=Pp3oYHAnjiziSS62" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/eXGcyAxRs8c?si=ANM-L0oGw9hSEOkA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Background: Recap from intro linguistics

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/N_mxmQOVpnQ?si=WqCU1-VVuPDfhakk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/PpzqldQghrA?si=94Bj9_qZhQ7QIF9K" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<!-- ## Discussion and deep dives -->

<!-- <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qCChQzxrM7k?si=bEn2LWYSM8SjQA1Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe> -->
